📋 Changelog

See what's new in Ifá-Lang

v1.3.0 (Current)

  • Architecture: Ratified protocol-oriented data model (no classes/inheritance).
  • Runtime: Unified three-tier execution model (AST Interpreter, Bytecode VM, Transpiler).
  • Domains: Canonical 16 Odù domains with binary patterns finalized.
  • Types: Dynamic typing with structural subtyping and domain protocols.
  • Memory: Opon memory management with Àjọṣe reactive system.
  • Spec: Complete IFA_LANG_RUNTIME_SPEC.md with normative requirements.
  • Docs: Comprehensive documentation overhaul with updated domain specifications.

v1.2.2 (Previous)

  • Docs: Comprehensive documentation overhaul.
  • Docs: Added Global Search, Dark Mode, and Syntax Highlighting.
  • Core: Improved Ẹbọ (resource sacrifice) mechanics.
  • Std: Enhanced Ọjà package manager integration.

v1.2.0

  • Feature: Introduced bilingual keywords (Yoruba/English).
  • Feature: Added 16 Odù domain modules (e.g., Ogbe, Irosu).
  • Tooling: Released VS Code extension with language server.

v1.0.0

  • Launch: First stable release of Ifá-Lang.
  • Core: Basic interpreter and VM implementation.

← Back to Documentation
